description: A high-stakes, competitive e-sport CS2 tournament platform. Visual identity focuses on 'Neon Strike': deep black/anthracite/night blue with neon orange/red/yellow accents. Aggressive, tactical, modern, and highly fluid.

textures.scanlines: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 4px)

cards.glassmorphic: bg-glass backdrop-blur-xl border border-borders-subtle rounded-lg p-6 relative overflow-hidden
cards.glowing_border: before:absolute before:inset-0 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-br before:from-brand-primary before:to-transparent before:rounded-lg before:-z-10
cards.team_card: bg-background-surface border border-borders-default hover:border-brand-primary transition-colors duration-300 relative

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-text-inverse font-heading uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 hover:bg-brand-secondary hover:shadow-neon_primary transition-all duration-300 clip-path-[polygon(10px_0,100%_0,100%_calc(100%-10px),calc(100%-10px)_100%,0_100%,0_10px)]
buttons.outline: border border-brand-primary text-brand-primary font-heading uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 hover:bg-brand-primary/10 hover:shadow-neon_primary transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary px-4 py-2 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors duration-200

inputs.default: bg-background-base border-b border-borders-default px-4 py-2 text-text-primary focus:border-brand-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none w-full

badges.steam_verified: bg-background-elevated border border-brand-cyan_tech/30 text-brand-cyan_tech px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2 rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)]
badges.status_live: bg-brand-accent/20 border border-brand-accent text-brand-accent px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase font-bold animate-pulse

page_transitions.entrance: staggered fade-up, elements enter with slight vertical translation and opacity fade in (duration 0.4s, ease-out)

interactions.hover: glow intensity increases, border colors shift to brand-primary, slight scale-up (1.02) for cards

countdown_10_0.10_to_7: Slow, massive pulse with heartbeat scale effect in center of screen.
countdown_10_0.6_to_4: Rapid zooming scale effect, increasing blur and speed.
countdown_10_0.3: High intensity, colors shift to red/orange, screen shake starts.
countdown_10_0.2: Heavy vibration, CSS translate shake, text distortion.
countdown_10_0.0: Luminous explosion (radial gradient burst), confetti particles.

complex_animations.bracket_reveal: Sweeping light beams across the screen, animated draw cards flipping into place, moderate particle emitter (confetti).

accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap all heavy animations (countdown, bracket reveal, particles) in prefers-reduced-motion media query. Fallback to simple opacity fades. Stop auto-playing videos.
accessibility.no_sound: Ensure all countdowns and reveals rely purely on visual cues, no mandatory audio feedback.
accessibility.contrast: Maintain APCA compliant contrast for text against #050608 and #0F1115 backgrounds.
accessibility.keyboard: Ensure all interactive elements have visible focus states (e.g., ring-2 ring-brand-primary outline-none).

Home.hero: Massive typography 'READYUP ARENA' with background video/image of dark esport stadium. Overlay scanlines. CTA to 'Join Tournament'.
Home.live_block: Twitch Major Embed prominently displayed with a glowing 'LIVE' badge and red neon border.
Home.sections: Upcoming Tournaments (Bento grid), Top Teams Leaderboard, Platform Stats.

TournamentsCatalog.layout: Sidebar for filters (Game modes, Skill level, Dates), Main area for grid of Tournament Cards.
TournamentsCatalog.cards: Include status badges (Open, Full, Live), prize pool, registered teams count, and dynamic background images.

TournamentDetail.hero: Tournament banner with intense neon gradients and logo.
TournamentDetail.content: Real-time registration status, prize distribution, schedule timeline.

WaitingRoom.layout: Split view: Team Queue vs Solo Queue.
WaitingRoom.real_time: Live updating participant lists, glowing 'Ready' toggles, countdown timer to match start.

MatchRoom.layout: Team A vs Team B split layout. Center holds the score and live server IP.
MatchRoom.features: 1v1 Challenge tokens integration, Match logs, reporting tools.

PlayerProfile.hero: Avatar with Steam Verified badge glowing cyan.
PlayerProfile.stats_cards: Bento grid of stats fetched from CSStats/CSWAT.CH (mocked). K/D ratio, Win Rate, ELO progression bar.

TeamPage.layout: Team logo, roster grid, recent match history, team ELO graph.

Rankings.layout: Dense data table for Top Players and Teams. Sortable columns, heavily branded with thin borders.

OrganizerAdmin.layout: Dense, functional dashboard. Sidebar navigation. High contrast data visualization.
OrganizerAdmin.features: Bracket generator, Yellow/Red cards arbitration system panel, Match dispute resolution.

Donations.layout: Centered payment card, Stripe/PayPal integration options, 'Support the Arena' messaging with virtual tokens display.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the DARK theme and Archetype 7+2 combo. Do not introduce generic white backgrounds.
For typography, import 'Chakra Petch' and 'Rajdhani' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Do NOT use typical Shadcn rounded cards out of the box. Modify Shadcn components to have sharp or slightly rounded corners with the glowing borders and glassmorphism specified in the design_tokens.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='tournament-register-button').
Use Framer Motion to implement the specific 10-0 countdown animation logic (scale, shake, flash) and ensure it responds to window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').
The wait room and 10-0 countdown should use mocked real-time state via standard React useEffect/useState hooks.
In the Admin panel, build the Yellow/Red card arbitration flow with distinct colors (#FFB800, #FF003C).
All texts and parameters must be passed as props or kept in a configurable constant file to satisfy the 'administrable' requirement.
Ensure the CSStats/CSWAT.CH stats on the profile page use the correct 'Verified' badges and neon cyan glows.
